name: about
description: Manage about — gets information about the user, the user's drive, and system capabilities. for more information, see [return user info](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/user-info). required: the `fields` parameter must be set. to return the exact fields you need, see [return specific fields](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/fields-parameter). Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
